category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a software MIDI player; official GitHub README says WildMIDI is a software MIDI player with a core softsynth library.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README uses WildMIDI; source_facts.name is wildmidi.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents platforms and building; repository has an official docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/Mindwerks/wildmidi, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables identify a MIDI player; official GitHub README describes MIDI-to-audio playback and a reusable library API.
